---
title: "Clinical PK TLF Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)

conc_summary <- read_csv("../output/tables/concentration_summary.csv")
pk_param_summary <- read_csv("../output/tables/pk_parameter_summary.csv")
pk_listing <- read_csv("../output/listings/pk_concentration_listing.csv")
```

# Table 1: Concentration Summary

```{r}
kable(conc_summary)
```

# Table 2: PK Parameter Summary

```{r}
kable(pk_param_summary)
```

# Listing 1: PK Concentration Listing

```{r}
kable(pk_listing)
```

# Figure 1: Spaghetti Plot

![](../output/plots/spaghetti_plot.png)
